ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "training_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for training the model */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used during model training */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, archived, deprecated) */,
  "last_evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last evaluation */,
  "last_evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the last performance metric entry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the model */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who last updated the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_training_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_data_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_version" TEXT /* Version of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of the evaluation (e.g., cross-validation, holdout) */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for the evaluation */,
  "test_size" REAL /* Size of the test dataset */,
  "train_size" REAL /* Size of the training dataset */,
  "evaluation_duration" REAL /* Duration of the evaluation in seconds */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the evaluation */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the evaluation */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who last updated the evaluation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* General notes or comments about the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, ML engineer, business analyst) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the dataset */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who last updated the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)
